rulings.Case Title: LONNETTE ROBINSON ET AL VS. LARUE PERKINS ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Application And Application For Order Authorizing Receiver To Engage Counsel And Petition For Instructions Concerning (A) Employment Of Property Manager And Certified Public Accountant, (B) Receivers Compensation, And (C) Steps To Be Taken To Determine Rent To Be Set For Utilizing Partners
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 23, 2020 line 1. OTHER SUSAN UECKER (RECEIVER)'s Application For Order Authorizing Receiver To Engage Counsel And Petition For Instructions Concerning (A) Employment Of Property Manager And Certified Public Accountant, (B) Receivers Compensation, And (C) Steps To Be Taken To Determine Rent To Be Set For Utilizing Partners Counsel is GRANTED. No opposition filed.= (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: LONNETTE ROBINSON ET AL VS. LARUE PERKINS ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION - Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Declaring Respondents The Prevailing Party And Awarding Reasonable Attorneys Fees And Costs To Respondents
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 23, 2020 line 1. RESPONDENT LARUE PERKINS, PATRICIA ANDERSON, BETTY BOWSER MOTION - Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Declaring Respondents The Prevailing Party And Awarding Reasonable Attorneys Fees And Costs To Respondents is DENIED. Moving party failed to show in its moving papers that the motion for appointment of a receiver constitutes "enforcement of the arbitration award," e.g. reference/citation to arbitration award language, etc. Moving Points and Authorities are 1.5-page long with no explanation or analysis linking the appointment of the receiver to the arbitration award or its enforcement. (See November 20, 2019 Memorandum of Points and Authorities 1:19-3:5). = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ALICE FARRELLY VS. 3515-17-19 SACRAMENTO STREET HOMEOWNERS ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION - Plaintiff'S Consolidated Notice Of Motion & Motion For Attorneys' Fees And Costs Against Defendants Mitchell & Cvetkovic & Their Counsel; Memorandum Of Points & Auihorities In Support
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 23, 2020 line 2. PLAINTIFF ALICE FARRELLY MOTION - Plaintiff'S Consolidated Notice Of Motion & Motion For Attorneys' Fees And Costs Against Defendants Mitchell & Cvetkovic & Their Counsel; Memorandum Of Points & Auihorities In Support is DENIED. Anti-SLAPP motions were not frivolous and were not filed solely intended to cause unnecessary delay. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: AERC 8TH & HARRISON LLC VS. ARNAUD T. BEZOLES ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 23, 2020 line 3. PLAINTIFF AERC 8TH & HARRISON LLC MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND is GRANTED. Plaintiff to prepare order. The Court notes that no courtesy copy of the motion was provided to the department in violation of SFLR 2.7B. = (501/REQ)
